zh.Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Browne I.於1200年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福時，他的父親Sir William Browne de Bruin De Lusignan31歲，母親Sarah Porter30歲。他於大約1246年與Joan Elizabeth Cheshire在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1260年在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Browne I.于1200年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福时，他的父亲Sir William Browne de Bruin De Lusignan31岁，母亲Sarah Porter30岁。他于大约1246年与Joan Elizabeth Cheshire在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1260年在他的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Browne I. was born in 1200, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir William Browne de Bruin De Lusignan, was 31 and his mother, Sarah Porter, was 30. He married Joan Elizabeth Cheshire about 1246, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1260, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, England.

Il a épousé Joan Elizabeth Cheshire environ 1246, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1260, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Browne I. è nato il nel 1200 nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Browne de Bruin De Lusignan, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Porter, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Joan Elizabeth Cheshire circa 1246, nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1260, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, England.

ko.All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshi: 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드 앨 세인츠' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne I.(이)가 1200년 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Browne de Bruin De Lusignan(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Porter(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1246년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 Joan Elizabeth Cheshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1260년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드 앨 세인츠' c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Joan Elizabeth Cheshire aproximadamente 1246, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshi: алл сеинц' чурч, стамфорд, линколншир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Browne I. родился в 1200 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Browne de Bruin De Lusignan было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Sarah Porter, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Elizabeth Cheshire около 1246 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1260 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц' чурч, стамфорд, линколншир, Англия.
